pack_yaml:
pack:
  id: kelompok3-umkm
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Connection-only pack for Kelompok 3 UMKM upstream services.
connections:
  - name: primary
    kind: postgres
    url: env://KELOMPOK3_DATABASE_URL
    pool:
      max_size: 5
      min_idle: 1
      acquire_timeout_ms: 3000
      idle_timeout_ms: 30000
workflows: []
